allow_instructions: Allow npm run build, git status, git add, git commit, git push, vercel deploy, and vercel inspect for MarketWall sprint workflow.
Allow npx vercel deploy, npx vercel inspect, and npx vercel ls.
Allow pnpm install when fixing lockfile before deploy.
block_instructions: Block git push --force, git reset --hard, database reset, and destructive production operations unless user explicitly requests.
